patch.value: Fix TOON array-of-objects continuation lines double-indent

renderToonValue prepended an extra '${indent}  ' to each continuation line of array-item objects, doubling indentation. Subsequent line was rendered at depth+1 already; the extra prefix caused 4 spaces where 2 were expected. Saves ~30-50% leading whitespace in list/search outputs.
list/search items render as YAML-style aligned blocks; all 1309 tests pass; no test asserted the buggy doubled indent.
